verdict: closed as far as this probe can tell
probe_sees: the decoded, resized RGB tensor only — never file size or JPEG headers, which the real model never sees either
caveat: Rule 3 makes the supplement location-disjoint, so backgrounds genuinely differ and that confound is unavoidable (DESIGN §5.2). This probe cannot tell 'different camera' from 'different encoder'; a positive result says investigate, not which cause.
